config.mcparks.title: My MCParks Experience Settings
config.mcparks.autoConnect.tooltip: Automatically connect to MCParks audio when joining a MCParks server.
config.mcparks.cursorReleaseOnRide.toolt: Automatically release the mouse cursor when mounting a ride, and re-grab it on dismount.
config.mcparks.hideMountMessageOnRide.to: Suppress the 'Press SHIFT to dismount' message when already on a ride. Prevents repeated messages during roller coaster inversions.
config.mcparks.autoFly.tooltip: Automatically send /fly when joining or switching worlds on MCParks.
config.mcparks.speedMultiplier.tooltip: Walking speed multiplier when fly mode is enabled (100% = normal, up to 500%).
config.mcparks.hideHealthBar.tooltip: Hide the health bar, hunger bar, and armor display for a cleaner view.
config.mcparks.hideExperienceLevel.toolt: Hide the experience level number above the XP bar.
config.mcparks.fullbright.tooltip: Force perpetual noon on MCParks servers by resetting the client-side time at sunset. May cause a ~1 tick flicker when night begins.
